calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-01-2018 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-30-2017 Continued To May-14-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Dec-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Ram Fletcher of the law offices of Bohn & Fletcher LLP (408-279-4222) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Jaemin Chang of the law offices of Fox Rothschild (415-364-5540) appears as counsel for plaintiff/defendant/moving/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT SIDECAR TECHNOLOGIES, INC. and SIDE.CR, LLC's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS as to both causes of action alleged in the complaint filed by plaintiff Asuncion Anithohin is granted with twenty days leave to amend as to both causes of action. If she can do so in good faith, Ms. Antithohin has leave to plead ultimate facts showing either a special relationship between defendants and Mr. Devoto or that defendants expressly agreed to take Mr. Devoto to Mr. Adams' house, were aware that Mr. Devoto was helpless, and agreed to care for him. (Williams v. Saga Enterprises, Inc. (1990) 225 Cal.App.3d 142.) Ms. Antithohin correctly cites Ingham v. Luxor Cab Co. (2001) 93 Cal.App.4th 1045 for the proposition that breach of a contract to deliver a passenger to an agreed destination can support tort damages. In Ingham, however, the taxi driver ejected the passenger and failed to bring the passenger to the passenger's requested destination. Ms. Anithohin fails to explain how defendants can be liable since Mr. Devoto apparently asked Mr. Devoto to drop him near his car rather than at Mr. Adams' house and Mr. Devoto complied. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR No. 8098, e-mail: casey.giselle@gmail.com. (L&M302)
